transitions.name: start_data_ingestion
transitions.description: Start the data ingestion process from the API.

criteria.name: scheduled_ingestion
criteria.description: Triggered by a scheduled job to ingest data.

process.description: Process to ingest raw data from the specified API.

transitions.description: Transform retrieved raw data into standardized format.
transitions.start_state_description: Data has been ingested and is ready for transformation.

criteria.description: Triggered by the completion of the data ingestion job.

process.name: transform_ingested_data
